title: YubiKey OATH OTP
shortDescription: Display TOTP codes from OATH accounts stored on your YubiKey in PowerToys Command Palette.
description:
YubiKey OATH OTP integrates YubiKey hardware-based TOTP codes directly into the PowerToys Command Palette.

Features:
- Lists all OATH/TOTP accounts stored on your connected YubiKey
- Generates current one-time passwords via the ykman CLI
- Click any account to instantly copy the code to clipboard
- Smart 10-second caching for minimal latency
- Configurable ykman path and device ID for multi-key setups

Requirements:
- YubiKey hardware with OATH credentials configured
- YubiKey Manager CLI (ykman) installed and in PATH (or path configured in settings)
